title: Medication Coordination Note
content:
## Clinical Note — Medication Coordination

**Date:** July 5, 2026

### Communication with PCP

Sent electronic message to Dr. Martinez (PCP) regarding sertraline titration. Recommended increase from 50 mg to 75 mg at next visit given:
- Patient tolerating 50 mg well (initial nausea resolved)
- Partial response observed (15% subjective improvement, resolution of passive death ideation)
- Prior therapeutic response at 100 mg documented in records

### Current Medication

- Sertraline 50 mg daily (week 5 of current trial)
- Lisinopril 10 mg daily (hypertension)

### Side Effect Monitoring

- GI: Initial nausea resolved after week 2
- Activation: None reported
- Sexual: Not assessed yet — plan to address at session 4
- Sleep: Some improvement (early-morning awakening reduced)

### Plan

- Continue 50 mg until PCP visit
- Target 75 mg at next PCP visit (~July 15)
- Target 100 mg by week 8 if tolerated
- Monitor for activation/hypomanic switch with dose increase
